<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. A short description usually beats a long one.
-->

## Summary

_One or two sentences on what this changes and why._

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / detector / persona
- [ ] Refactor (no user-visible change)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (`fmt-check`, `clippy -D warnings`, `test`, `audit`, `deny`)
- [ ] New behaviour has tests, or there is a reason it does not
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, real IPs, or real victim data committed
- [ ] No new dependency that is not explained in the description
